title: ulmus oblongata
intro: Ulmus oblongata, also known as the Chinese Elm, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the Elm family (Ulmaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ulmus oblongata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ulmus oblongata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to make capsules or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
